user.title: Connect to KWB Heating
user.description: Enter the connection details for your KWB heating system.

device.title: Select Heating Device
device.description: Select your KWB heating device model.

modules.title: Select Add-on Modules
modules.description: Select any additional modules installed in your system. Leave empty if none.

data.expert_mode: Enable expert controls (Boiler program, External specification, Ignition settings)

module_instances.title: Detected {module_name} Instances
module_instances.description: The following instances were automatically detected via Modbus. Please verify and add or remove instances as needed.

module_instance_names.title: Name {module_name} Instances
module_instance_names.description: Give each {module_name} instance a friendly name. This name will be used for all entities of that instance (e.g. 'Underfloor heating', 'Bathroom').

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure connection and modules
reconfigure.description: Update the connection settings and selected modules for this entry.

data.expert_mode: Enable expert controls (Boiler program, External specification, Ignition settings)

data_description.host: IP address or hostname of the KWB controller.
data_description.scan_interval: Interval for polling Modbus data in seconds.
data_description.expert_mode: Enable or disable expert select entities (Boiler program, External specification, Ignition settings).
data_description.addon_modules: Select installed add-on modules. You can add or remove modules here.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to KWB heating system. Please check IP address and port.
